nasb.text: in the hill country, in the lowland, in the Arabah, on the slopes, and in the wilderness, and in the Negev; the Hittite, the Amorite and the Canaanite, the Perizzite, the Hivite and the Jebusite:

esv.text: in the hill country, in the lowland, in the Arabah, in the slopes, in the wilderness, and in the Negeb, the land of the Hittites, the Amorites, the Canaanites, the Perizzites, the Hivites, and the Jebusites):

cnv.text: 就是赫人、亞摩利人、迦南人、比利洗人、希未人、耶布斯人所住的山地、高原、亞拉巴、山坡、曠野和南地。

ccb.text: 那里有山区、丘陵、河谷、山坡、旷野和南地，就是赫人、亚摩利人、迦南人、比利洗人、希未人、耶布斯人住的地方。
